known_issues.description: Engine assigns NOVA 2 to Bamba and similar extruded puffed snacks due to short ingredient lists (corn+peanut butter+palm oil+salt). The correct NOVA is 4 — industrial extrusion is NOVA 4 by nature. BSIP1 assigns NOVA 4 but the engine independently re-calculates and downgrades. This scores Bamba at 70/B instead of the expected low-C/D range. Flagged to Nutrition Agent for TASK-189/engine fix.
known_issues.engine_impact: NOVA 2 → score inflated by ~15-20 points for extruded puffed snacks without E-number additives
known_issues.action: Log and note in run summary; do not adjust scores ad hoc per TASK-213 protocol
